name: my-ppt
description: Personal PPT strategy, design, review, and production workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Design, review, and produce slide decks.
interface.longDescription: My PPT collects reusable Codex skills, prompts, workflows, and helper scripts for planning persuasive decks, shaping slide-by-slide stories, creating visual systems, and auditing presentation quality.
defaultPrompt: Use $my-ppt to design a deck from this brief.
Use $my-ppt to review this presentation outline.
Use $my-ppt to turn these notes into slide structure.
